About

I’m Zhang Jincheng, an MPhil student at the Chinese University of Hong Kong.

I got my bachelor degree of computer science from Tsinghua University in 2012.

Experiences

Internships: Software Developer at Yahoo! (2011-2012), Quantitative Analyst at Infore Capital (2014)

Professtional Activities: Reviewer for the IEEE Infocom 2014 and 2015, Networking Session Chair for the 2014 International Doctoral Forum, Volunteer for the ACM Sigcomm 2013

Awards

  • Best Paper Award, the 7th International Doctoral Forum, 2014

  • Postgraduate Fellowship, 2012-2014

  • Sun Hung Kai Scholarship, 2009-2011

  • Tsinghua Alumni Scholarship, 2009-2010

Publications and Patents

The author marked with * is the student supervised by me.

  1. “Exploring Indoor White Spaces in Metropolises”

    Jincheng Zhang, Xuhang Ying, Lichao Yan, Guanglin Zhang, Minghua Chen, Ranveer Chandra

    Under submission to IEEE TON.

  2. “WINET: Indoor White Space Network Design”

    Jincheng Zhang, Wenjie Zhang, Minghua Chen, Zhi Wang

    Under submission to IEEE TMC.

  3. “Boosting Indoor White Space Identification by Exploiting the Substructure of Unexplored Data”

    Yu Chen*, Jincheng Zhang, Lichao Yan, Minghua Chen

    In Proceedings of IEEE INFOCOM, 2015. (poster)

  4. “WINET: Indoor White Space Network Design”

    Jincheng Zhang, Wenjie Zhang, Minghua Chen, Zhi Wang

    In Proceedings of IEEE INFOCOM, 2015. (Acceptance rate: 19%)

  5. “Exploring Indoor White Spaces in Metropolises”

    Xuhang Ying, Jincheng Zhang, Lichao Yan, Guanglin Zhang, Minghua Chen, Ranveer Chandra

    In Proceedings of ACM Mobicom, 2013. (Acceptance rate: 13.5%)

  6. “Towards Bandwidth Guarantee in Multi-tenancy Cloud Computing Networks”

    Jing Zhu, Dan Li, Jianping Wu, Hongnan Liu, Ying Zhang, Jincheng Zhang

    In Proceedings of IEEE ICNP, 2012. (Acceptance rate: 22.9%)

  7. “The Method of AP Association for Proportional Fairness in Multi-rate WLANs”

    Yong Cui, Wei Li, Jincheng Zhang

    People’s Republic of China Patent No. CN102223676B, issued on Sep 4, 2013.
